_comment.cardboarded_conveynience.nermal: Nermal as in the Garfield character often mailed away in boxes. Pun on 'normal'. Translators: try making a pun with your localized name!
advancement.cardboarded_conveynience.lik: Ride a chain conveyor like any other package
advancement.cardboarded_conveynience.ner: Get delivered to a Frogport using nametag routing
cardboarded_conveynience.ponder.belt_tun: A disguised player on a belt can pass through tunnels...
...a package disguise will match - you pass right through!
When the filter matches a piece of armor you're wearing...
...such as the helmet on your head, so you're let in!
When you're holding the matching item in either hand...
...the filter will let you through as well.
However... when disguised as a package...
Andesite tunnels also let crawling players through...
Brass tunnels can filter what passes through...
...but you can fool them by presenting the correct item.
A wrench filter won't let a cardboard package through...
But when the filter allows packages...
cardboarded_conveynience.ponder.cardboar: Wear full cardboard armor while riding a chain conveyor...
cardboarded_conveynience.ponder.chute_te: Sneak while standing on a chute in full cardboard armor...
...to instantly drop to the bottom of the stack!
Diagonal chutes work too - enter this one...
A smart chute with the wrong filter won't route you...
With a package filter, you're dropped just like a real package!
Since nothing can pass through a locked smart chute...
cardboarded_conveynience.ponder.frogport: Usually, players ride chain conveyors with no regards to frogports...
...any matching Frogport becomes a valid destination.
...and routing at junctions just follows the direction you're facing.
While disguised as a package, a nametag in your offhand routes you automatically...
...to the matching Frogport, anywhere on the network.
